title: Add per-row direct-assign toggle to keyword mapping UI in public/index.html
description: Extend the keyword mapping admin UI in public/index.html with: (1) per-row 'DIRECT' badge in renderCategoryMappings() — shown when mapping.directAssign=true, absent otherwise, placed in the category-mapping-header next to the mapping name; (2) form checkbox in add/edit mapping form labeled 'Direct assign (bypass AI)' with helper text placed after the keywords input; (3) update saveCategoryMapping() (line ~3636) to include directAssign: checkbox.checked in payload; (4) update editCategoryMapping() (line ~3774) to accept 5th argument directAssign and set checkbox.checked = Boolean(directAssign); (5) update call site in renderCategoryMappings() (line ~3758) to pass !!mapping.directAssign as 5th arg.
notes: Badge placement: inside mapping header next to mapping name (line ~3741 in renderCategoryMappings template). Form checkbox: after keywords textarea (in the add/edit form). Helper text: 'When enabled, transactions matching these keywords are assigned the target category immediately without calling OpenAI.' UI toggle is independent of the enabled/disabled master switch — a mapping must be both enabled AND directAssign=true to trigger direct-assign behavior. Per architecture §3.3: use existing badge CSS classes if present, else inline style.
verification_steps: renderCategoryMappings() displays 'DIRECT' badge on mappings with directAssign=true.
Add/edit form has checkbox labeled 'Direct assign (bypass AI)' with helper text.
saveCategoryMapping() includes directAssign: checkbox.checked in POST/PUT payload.
editCategoryMapping() populates checkbox correctly from mapping.directAssign value.
Call site passes !!mapping.directAssign as 5th arg (no undefined leakage).
Existing 18/18 tests unaffected (UI-only change, no test changes needed).
Manual smoke: create new mapping with directAssign=true, confirm badge appears; edit it, confirm checkbox checked; uncheck and save, confirm badge disappears.
